DP.043.0000:
Wi: We come from faraway land.
I come see the Pokémon I trade.\f
I worry if it growing properly.
DP.043.0001:
Fi: I like look at Pokémon I get
from friend in trade.\f
It make me remember my friend!
DP.043.0002:
You can trade Pokémon with people
around the world on Nintendo WFC...\f
Just hearing that gets my heart
racing. Such exciting times!
DP.043.0003:
When you connect with people on
Nintendo WFC, it’s hard to\r
tell if the world’s big or small.
